Off Calendar Sep-11-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc.'s Motion For Appointment Of Receiver And To Appoint Richard B. Cole As Receiver is granted. No opposition has been filed. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED
